qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: API router reflects arbitrary Origin header enabling cross-origin credential theft
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns arbitrary Origin reflection and disabled same-domain checks in plugin/API/router.php and API endpoints, not command injection in plugin/Live/test.php wget() URL handling.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Login API response exposes user password hash and session ID to the client
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns objects/login.json.php returning password hashes and session IDs, not the advisory's plugin/Live/test.php weak URL validation and unsanitized shell command construction.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated comment deletion allows any remote attacker to delete arbitrary user comments
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns a missing authorization check in objects/commentDelete.json.php, not command injection in plugin/Live/test.php wget() URL handling.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is command injection in AVideo plugin/Live/test.php through weak /^http/ URL validation and unsanitized URL or filename interpolation into the wget exec() command. The three final qualifying findings cover unrelated endpoints and mechanisms.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-pq8p-wc4f-vg7j describes plugin/Live/test.php wget($url, $filename), preg_match("/^http/", $url), and exec("wget --tries=1 {$url} -O {$filename} --no-check-certificate") as the vulnerable root cause.
.judge/input_manifest.json lists the final qualifying finding folders as api_cors_origin_reflection, password_hash_exposure_in_login, and unauthenticated_comment_deletion.
api_cors_origin_reflection reports arbitrary Origin reflection in plugin/API/router.php and bypassSameDomainCheck in API endpoints.
password_hash_exposure_in_login reports password hash and PHP session ID exposure in objects/login.json.php.
unauthenticated_comment_deletion reports unauthenticated deletion through objects/commentDelete.json.php.
